title: Tool Registry, Allowlist, Validation, Dispatch, Results, and Unknown Calls
description: The dispatcher uses globals by name, trusts model arguments, drops call IDs, returns raw exceptions, retries effects, and invokes unknown tools through dynamic import. Learners cumulatively produce allowlisted tool registry and result envelope through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Register immutable tool name, schema version, handler, effect class, policy, timeout, owner, and result contract in one auditable catalog.
Preserve provider call ID, local attempt ID, interaction ID, tool version, arguments digest, result digest, and timestamps.
Validate and normalize model arguments before policy and execution while retaining rejected input evidence safely.
